examples: It quickly became clear that the woman was not a computer technician.
When my voice hit a certain decibel, I was passed along, like a hot, irritable potato, to a technician.
An X-rays technician is refusing to do her job until the firm agrees to replace its out-dated equipment.
My husband also - his job, he's a surveillance technician in one of the local casinos.
For now, The Technician is relegated to the pages of a real and digital comic.
